prompt: {"type":"fashion reference sheet","subject":{"garment":"children's fantasy hooded dress and cape ensemble","model":{"age_appearance":"young girl","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"golden blonde\"}","style":"long loose ringlets visible beneath the hood"},"face":"intentionally blurred and indistinct","pose":"standing straight with arms hidden under the cape, barefoot"},"outfit":{"primary_color":"{argument name=\"outfit color\" default=\"deep navy blue\"}","inner_dress":"floor-length dress with a square neckline, pale decorative trim, silver embroidery with floral vines and small stars on the front panel, asymmetrical embroidered hem detail, and a soft gray-blue tulle underskirt peeking out at the bottom","cape":"full-length hooded cape in matching navy with pale patterned trim running along the hood edge, front opening, side vertical borders, and hem","decorations":{"count":5,"items":["silver floral vine embroidery","small star motifs","draped chain-like beaded garlands across the chest and back","2 white tassels hanging at the upper front and upper back","ornamental trim in a pale silver-white geometric lace pattern"]},"accessories":{"count":1,"items":["dark choker necklace"]}},"studio":{"background":"plain light gray studio wall","floor":"medium-toned wooden floor","lighting":"soft even catalog lighting","framing":"full body, centered, consistent scale across all views"},"layout":{"background":"white page with three vertical image panels","sections":[{"title":"正面図","position":"left","count":1,"labels":["front view"]},{"title":"側面図","position":"center","count":1,"labels":["side view"]},{"title":"背面図","position":"right","count":1,"labels":["back view"]}],"total_views":3},"style":"clean apparel documentation photo, ecommerce costume specification sheet, high detail fabric texture, realistic folds, accurate garment construction, symmetrical presentation","instructions":"Create a three-view clothing reference sheet of {argument name=\"garment name\" default=\"a navy fantasy hooded dress for a child\"}, showing front, side, and back views. Include the Japanese headings 正面図, 側面図, and 背面図 above the three panels. Emphasize the large pointed hood, silver-white trim, embroidered celestial and floral motifs, draped chain details, tassels, and layered tulle hem. Keep the face blurred, the background minimal, and the overall look like a professional costume catalog image."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"服装参考图","subject":{"garment":"儿童奇幻连帽礼服与斗篷套装","model":{"age_appearance":"小女孩","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"金黄色\"}","style":"长卷发，从兜帽下露出"},"face":"刻意模糊，不清晰","pose":"直立，双臂藏在斗篷下，赤脚"},"outfit":{"primary_color":"{argument name=\"outfit color\" default=\"深海军蓝\"}","inner_dress":"及地长裙，方领，浅色装饰边，前襟饰有花藤与小星星图案的银色刺绣，不对称刺绣下摆细节，底部露出浅灰蓝色薄纱衬裙","cape":"全长连帽斗篷，颜色与礼服相配，兜帽边缘、前开口、侧面垂直边框及下摆饰有浅色花纹边饰","decorations":{"count":5,"items":["银色花藤刺绣","小星星图案","胸前与背部垂坠的链状串珠花环","前后上方各悬挂 2 个白色流苏","浅银白色几何蕾丝装饰边"]},"accessories":{"count":1,"items":["深色颈圈项链"]}},"studio":{"background":"纯浅灰色摄影棚背景墙","floor":"中色调木地板","lighting":"柔和均匀的目录摄影灯光","framing":"全身，居中，所有视图比例一致"},"layout":{"background":"白色页面，包含三个垂直图像面板","sections":[{"title":"正面図","position":"左","count":1,"labels":["正面视图"]},{"title":"側面図","position":"中","count":1,"labels":["侧面视图"]},{"title":"背面図","position":"右","count":1,"labels":["背面视图"]}],"total_views":3},"style":"简洁的服装文档照片，电商服装规格表，高细节面料纹理，逼真的褶皱，准确的服装结构，对称展示","instructions":"创建一个三视图服装参考图，展示 {argument name=\"garment name\" default=\"儿童海军蓝奇幻连帽礼服\"}，包含正面、侧面和背面视图。在三个面板上方添加日语标题 正面図、側面図 和 背面図。强调大尖兜帽、银白色饰边、刺绣天体与花卉图案、垂坠链条细节、流苏以及层叠的薄纱下摆。保持面部模糊，背景简洁，整体呈现专业服装目录图像的风格。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 三视图连帽奇幻礼服参考图：此提示词可生成一张摄影棚风格的三视图服装参考图，展示一名身着华丽连帽奇幻礼服的儿童，适用于服装设计展示或目录文档。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, fantasy, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
